productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Valley-Fdt Red Casual Shoes
description: Blending the legendary minimal design of Ransom teams and the sporty vibe of adidas, the Valley FDT shoe from adidas features a suede upper and a premium lamb leather footbed, offering exemplary comfort.UpperSuede upperLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue for comfort and optimum fitLamb leather padded footbed for all-day comfortHigh ankle with a textile collar for absolute breathable comfort and better support to the lower legMidsoleMoulded EVA midsole detailing for vintage style and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with multi-directional herringbone grooves for absolute durability, grip and tractionShoe careUse a suede brush to clean the upperDo not store in direct sunlight
